proposal_summary: This proposal requests to initiate a new daily stream of 15,075.33 USDC from the ENS DAO treasury to ENS Labs, starting January 1, 2025, to fund the development and security audits of ENSv2.

disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: initiate a new daily stream of 15,075.33 USDC from the ENS DAO treasury

disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: from the ENS DAO treasury to ENS Labs

disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: existing streaming contract of 11,500 USDC/day at 0xB1377e4f32e6746444970823D5506F98f5A04201
